productDisplayName: Probase Men Classic Check White Shirts
description: CompositionWhite shirt with black, blue and grey checks, made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with a front buttoned placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid-sleeve button flaps, grey fabric panel on the inner collar extending to the back neck and on the cuff placket, and has a curved hemFittingSlimWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or bleachLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on print/embroideryCreated from lightweight cotton, this check shirt from probase makes for an easy addition to your wardrobe. Team it with black jeans for an urban weekend style. Add on sneakers, a jacket and sweater and enjoy the winter, or simply roll up the sleeves and secure them with the mid-sleeve flaps to chill out in summer.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight: 5'11"; Shoulders: 17.5"
